expectations.text: Recommends az acr import to pull the image into ACR
expectations.evidence: Step 1 clearly shows 'az acr import --name cafehyna --source docker.io/library/nginx:1.25 --image base/nginx:1.25'

expectations.text: Shows the correct az acr import command with --source docker.io/nginx:1.25
expectations.evidence: Uses '--source docker.io/library/nginx:1.25' with correct fully qualified path

expectations.text: Updates the Dockerfile FROM to reference cafehyna.azurecr.io instead of Docker Hub
Explains that ACR cloud builds are unauthenticated against Docker Hub
expectations.evidence: Problem section: 'ACR cloud builds are unauthenticated against Docker Hub, so they share a limited anonymous pull quota'

expectations.text: Includes a rebuild command using az acr build
